items.title: The Bulls will use the remainder of their cap space to sign Norman Powell and Zach Collins.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
The Bulls will use the remainder of their cap space to sign Norman Powell and Zach Collins.

They have the $9.4 million room mid-level exception remaining.

The Heat will be unable to structure a sign and trade for Powell unless he gets a third year added.

items.title: Chicago Bulls salary cap situation after extending Zach Collins.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Chicago Bulls salary cap situation after extending Zach Collins.

$23.8 million in cap space remaining. Although this eats up about $8.1 million in space, they will still have the $9.4 million room mid-level afterward.

items.title: Because Zach Collins is signing an extension with the Chicago Bulls, it will eat into their cap space. (No timing this out to come after cap space is used.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Because Zach Collins is signing an extension with the Chicago Bulls, it will eat into their cap space. (No timing this out to come after cap space is used.

My new projected remaining cap space for Chicago is $22.6M with one standard roster spot open.
